input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.5.3
            TITLE: presentations will be time limited. the judges will stop any presentation exceeding the time

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.5.3: Presentations will be time limited. The judges will stop any presentation exceeding the time
S.2.5.3 Presentations will be time limited. The judges will stop any presentation exceeding the time 
limit.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 119 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Presentations will be time limited. The judges will stop any presentation exceeding the time limit.
